name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: ₹6,000 per year direct income support to all farmer families with cultivable land, in 3 installments of ₹2,000.
eligibility: All small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land. Up to 2 hectares in most states.
how_to_apply: Register at pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest CSC (Common Service Centre). Need Aadhaar, bank account, land documents.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance at low premium. Farmer pays 1.5-5% of sum insured, rest shared by Centre and State.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Both loanee and non-loanee farmers.
how_to_apply: Through bank (loanee farmers) or CSC/insurance company portal (non-loanee). Need land records, bank account, Aadhaar.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Low-interest credit facility for farming needs. Interest subvention of 2% available. Effective rate: 4% per annum.
eligibility: All farmers — individual/joint borrowers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees.
how_to_apply: Apply at any nationalized bank, cooperative bank, or RRB. Need land records, Aadhaar, passport photo.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Free soil testing and recommendations for farmers. Get nutrient status of your soil and fertilizer recommendations.
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) or Soil Testing Lab. Submit soil samples as per instructions.

name: Subsidy on Agricultural Machinery
description: Subsidies of 25-50% on farm machinery — tractors, sprayers, seed drills, power tillers, drip/sprinkler irrigation, etc.
eligibility: Small/marginal farmers get higher subsidy. SC/ST/women farmers get priority.
how_to_apply: Apply through State Agriculture Department or DBT Agriculture portal. Check state-specific schemes.

name: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
description: Promotes climate-resilient agriculture — water-use efficiency, soil health management, nutrient management, and rainfed farming.
how_to_apply: Through State Agriculture Department. Includes components like Per Drop More Crop, Rainfed Area Development.

name: eNAM (Electronic National Agriculture Market)
description: Online trading platform connecting APMC mandis across India. Better price discovery, transparent auction.
how_to_apply: Register at enam.gov.in. Can sell through nearest eNAM-linked mandi.

name: PM Kusum (Solar Pump & Power)
description: Solar pumps and solarization of agricultural connections. Subsidy up to 60% on solar pumps. Sell surplus power to grid.
eligibility: Individual farmers, cooperatives, FPOs, water user associations.
how_to_apply: Apply through State Nodal Agency or online portal.
